drafts.subject: Re: Insights for TechCrunch article on Silicon Valley future
drafts.body:
Hi Mattie,

Thanks for reaching out. The long-view analysis of AI, robots, holodecks, and BCIs is a fascinating topic, and I appreciate you thinking of me for this piece.

I am definitely interested in contributing my perspective on these emerging technologies. To ensure we move forward smoothly, I have copied Asher Weisberger, our Client Services Manager, and Sam Levin, my business partner at UNALIGNED.

Asher will reach out shortly to discuss the next steps and coordinate the interview details.

Best,
Robert

Robert Scoble
Founder, Unaligned
scobleizer@gmail.com
https://x.com/scobleizer
https://unaligned.io

drafts.subject: Re: AI Agents & Autonomous Systems Feature at TechCrunch
drafts.body:
Hi Patty,

Thanks for reaching out. The topic of AI agents and autonomous systems is right at the top of my mind right now, and I'd love to contribute a perspective on the shift from early concepts to real-world deployment.

I will loop in Asher Weisberger from our Client Services team to follow up with you directly regarding the next steps. He will be the main point of contact moving forward to discuss how we can make this work.

Best regards,
Robert Scoble
